commit_scope: Move the mesh dashboard from a visible topology floor toward live mesh observability with discovery readiness, route-quality topology, and model-training control measurements.

commands: cd web && npm ci --cache ../.cache/npm --prefer-offline && npm run build
local_validation.notes: The first web build in the fresh worktree failed because next was not installed; npm ci installed the declared web dependencies and the build passed. The first local PR guard failed because the fresh worktree had not built form/form-kernel-rust/target/release/form-kernel-rust; after cargo build --release --quiet, the local PR guard passed with ready_for_push=True. Existing Next warnings remained unchanged: middleware convention, typeless package JSON, and NFT tracing warning.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; remote Thread Gates have not run for this branch yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No production deploy requested for this dashboard/API compatibility slice.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The mesh dashboard now distinguishes node discovery/readiness states, shows trust/signal/battery/power receipt measurements, renders route-quality topology with signal rings and channel legends, and exposes model-training control decisions beside the topology.
test_flows: Step 1 browser review against seeded local receipts measured 4 nodes, 3 channels, 102.5 KB/s flow, 2 streaming/training nodes, 73.5% average signal, and 1 ready route.
Step 2 browser review confirmed topology legend, channel legend, route quality labels, all 4 node labels, and average route quality visible on the field map.
Step 3 browser review confirmed model training control with 1/1 native wins, 0 oracle reliance, 3 cycles, 12 heldout samples, 11 attention surfaces, and a choose-native current winner.

phase_gate.gate: The mesh observatory must show live-shaped topology, route readiness, and model training control before larger continuous training can be directed well.
phase_gate.next: Attach persistent live channel probes so the dashboard updates from Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, audio, optical, and loopback measurements rather than seeded local receipts.

floor_update.previous_observed_floor: The dashboard could show a multi-node mesh field, typed channels, and model training health, but every visible node and route had the same operational weight.
floor_update.current_observed_floor: The dashboard can inspect discovery state, stream/trust readiness, signal strength, battery, power cost, route quality, topology labels, channel modality, native wins, oracle reliance, cycles, heldout windows, and current training decision.
retuned_north_star: devices should be discovered and ranked by live evidence, not only declared presence
routes should show quality, power, trust, latency, error, payload, and model linkage on the topology
model training should expose choice pressure: native wins, oracle reliance, heldout windows, cycles, branch success, and attention
